Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jordan K. Wager, Esq. of The Bickel Law Firm, T:619.374.4100, for plaintiff/moving party;
Brian Takahashi, Esq. of Bowman and Brooke LLP, for defendant/opposing party, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court allows parties to submit documents by Friday, March 30, 2018 and will take PLAINTIFFS IGOR PATASHVILI and DANIEL PATASHVILI's Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses under submission on that day.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org.
